description_long: This is a round, double-layered cake generously topped with a variety of fresh berries, including strawberries, blueberries, and blackberries. The cake is lavishly dusted with powdered sugar, creating a snowy effect over the fruit and the upper surface. The layers appear to be separated by a visible filling, possibly cream or jam, with some berries embedded between the layers. The cake's surface is uneven due to the abundance of fruit and the thick layer of powdered sugar, giving it a rustic, homemade appearance. The sides of the cake show some exposed sponge and fruit, while the top is dominated by the white dusting and vibrant berries. There is no visible plate or stand beneath the cake, and it sits directly on a flat surface.
description: A rustic, double-layered cake topped with assorted fresh berries and heavily dusted with powdered sugar, giving it a snowy, festive look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cake's two layers, abundant berries, and a thick dusting of powdered sugar, with strawberries and blueberries most prominent.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the uneven, berry-laden top and the thick layer of powdered sugar, with more strawberries visible on the right side.
description_view_2: The back view emphasizes the heavy powdered sugar coating, partially obscuring the berries and making the cake appear almost entirely white on top.
description_view_3: This side view reveals the exposed cake sponge and a cluster of berries, with the powdered sugar less dominant than in the rear view.
